source: - 4.3.5.3.1 DoneOnReset Restrictions The TPer SHALL support the following DoneOnReset column values:
title: DoneOnReset Restrictions

source:
- a) { 0, 1 } (i.e. Power Cycle and Hardware Reset); and
- b) { 0,1, 3 } (i.e. Power Cycle, Hardware Reset and Programmatic).
title: DoneOnReset Restrictions
